tools.name: accountReports.localservicesAccountReportsSearch
tools.description: Get account reports containing aggregate account data of all linked GLS accounts. Caller needs to provide their manager customer id and the associated auth credential that allows them read permissions on their linked accounts.

tools.name: detailedLeadReports.localservicesDetailedLeadReportsSearch
tools.description: Get detailed lead reports containing leads that have been received by all linked GLS accounts. Caller needs to provide their manager customer id and the associated auth credential that allows them read permissions on their linked accounts.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
